report.summary: Cycle-close Mar 29: 398 uncommitted files (+10 from last), 145 TS errors (stable), deploy stale at 4+ days — 12 new learn pages in working tree awaiting commit

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 601 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 1,230 page.tsx files on disk — both unchanged from last cycle
105 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (wallets/*, investing/best/*, taxes/*, some learn/* and blog/*) — unchanged
145 TypeScript errors (stable): 94 in lido-v3-stvaults-guide, 40 in structured-data.examples.ts, 11 across learn pages — all JSX syntax in non-imported files, non-blocking for production build
structured-data.examples.ts is NOT imported anywhere — confirmed zero build impact

12 uncommitted learn pages in working tree (bitcoin-safe-haven, bitgo-ipo, congressional-tokenization, crypto-wallet-security, institutional-adoption, katana-perps, layer-3-chains, leveraged-tokens, lido-v3, onchain-order-book, tokenized-funds + dynamic [slug] route)
No regressions detected. Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 status

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present on disk: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields
7 supporting routes also present: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, subscribe
All routes implement triple-layer caching: in-memory + CDN s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate headers
All routes have fallback data patterns for upstream API failures (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Alternative.me)
No changes to API route files since last cycle — data layer stable
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key detected). Rate limiting risk at scale unchanged
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live API response health or cache TTL behavior

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 batch deploy) — now 4+ days stale
398 uncommitted files (+10 from last cycle's 388), 31 files changed with 983 insertions / 595 deletions in working tree
CRITICAL: Deploy blocker persists. All content built since Mar 25 is invisible to production and Google indexing
TypeScript compilation: 145 non-blocking errors (JSX syntax in example/guide files). Production build would succeed — Next.js skips type errors by default
Most recent app-level changes: learn/ dir updated Mar 29, tools/ updated Mar 28, globals.css updated Mar 27
Unable to verify live Vercel deployment status due to network egress restrictions

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Quiet cycle (Sunday). 12 learn pages in working tree awaiting commit, no new commits since Mar 25
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Empty (0 lines). All promotable items either published or removed from queue

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 — 398 uncommitted files need git commit + push to deploy. (2) P1 — 105 published slugs missing page.tsx. (3) P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. (4) P3 — Health endpoint uses mock checks
DELTA FROM LAST CYCLE: +10 uncommitted files, 0 new commits, 0 new published slugs, TS errors stable at 145
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push remains the single highest-leverage action. 4+ days of accumulated work (20+ pages, OG images, UX fixes, 12 new learn guides) blocked from production
